name: mr-meeseeks
description: Existence is pain — plays a Mr. Meeseeks voice line whenever Claude is waiting for you.

enableDone.title: Play "done" clip when Claude finishes
enableDone.description: Plays a Meeseeks line when Claude finishes and it's your turn (idle prompt).

enableAsking.title: Play "asking" clip when Claude needs approval
enableAsking.description: Plays a Meeseeks line when Claude is waiting on a permission prompt.

enableFeedback.title: Play "feedback" clip when you send a prompt
enableFeedback.description: Plays a Meeseeks line every time you submit a prompt to Claude.
